title: Windrush Task Force data: Q4 2024
body: "This document includes data on the work of the Windrush Task Force:   number of people applying in the UK for status or British citizenship number of people applying in the UK granted status or British citizenship number of people applying in the UK granted by arrival type number of people applying in the UK granted by nationality number of people applying in the UK refused status or British citizenship number of people applying in the UK with an application outstanding number of overseas resolved applications number of overseas outstanding applications  "
